rationale: In the citing paper, Geyskens, Gielens, and Gijsbrechts (2010) appears only as a brief methodological pointer in a data footnote about handling excluded trips when constructing state-dependence measures ('see also ... 2010'). The cited study is not used in the paper's core theory of chain versus outlet loyalty, hypothesis development, model structure, or interpretation of takeover effects. This indicates a passing reference rather than a meaningful intellectual dependency.
